feedback: All aspects improved: correctness is maintained (6/6 correct), design soundness is evident (MANDATORY block and check cap rationale), and test coverage is solid (all tests passed). Remaining areas include: 1) testing the MANDATORY block's injectivity in edge cases, 2) validating the escalation levels (5-9 and 10+), and 3) ensuring the feedback text is fully included without extra space. No further issues identified.

Three test failures persist after refactor: (1) checkGoal doesn't return true when file exists with last-assistant confirmation, and (2) supervisor-nudge-success fixture still fails to filter injected messages from context window. f6 deep-history-noise remains unresolved as a structural concern. Proceeding with these design improvements is correct—mandatory evidence blocks + escalating nudge strategy are sound—but implementation needs verification that supervisor-injected content doesn't pollute the 'last-2-msgs' judge view.

Functional regression: core checkGoal is now rejecting valid completed goals when injected [supervisor]/[autopilot] messages exist in context (2 tests failing). The f6-deep-history-noise fix shows good filtering logic, but need to verify how reachability scoring handles supervisor nudge comments between last user/assistant pair. Priority: add regression cases with mixed message types before merging.
